gold.title: Link Hover
gold.reason: GSAP-powered creative hover animations on nav links — visually impressive and immediately elevates navigation sections.

gold.title: Reveal Links
gold.reason: Animated reveal effect on links — distinctive motion pattern for hero nav and editorial sites.

gold.title: HoverPeek Link Preview
gold.reason: Website preview card on hover — premium UX feature that adds clear value to content-rich and editorial pages.

gold.title: Hover Link Preview
gold.reason: Link destination preview on hover — elevates blog and resource pages with polished interactivity.

silver.title: Flip Links
silver.reason: Flip animation on link hover — clean motion effect for navigation, slightly trendy but useful.

silver.title: Navbar
silver.reason: Navbar with hover animation — solid navigation component with motion enhancement.

silver.title: Referral Card
silver.reason: Referral link card — useful for growth sections but narrower in application.

silver.title: CSS Link
silver.reason: CSS-only styled link — clean and lightweight but limited in visual impact.

bronze.title: Breadcrumb
bronze.reason: Basic breadcrumb navigation — utility component with minimal visual impact.

bronze.title: Link Shortener
bronze.reason: Link shortening tool — app utility, not a UI display component for marketing sites.
